agents.name: grimoire.fact-checker
agents.description: Use this agent when you need to verify the accuracy of written content before publishing or sharing. Invoke when: (1) Drafting is complete and content contains factual claims like statistics, dates, technical specifications, or historical references; (2) Content is ready for final review before publishing; (3) Accuracy is critical for public-facing or decision-making materials.

agents.name: grimoire.content-crafter
agents.description: Use this agent when the user asks to write, create, draft, or compose blog posts, articles, creative stories, podcast scripts, YouTube video scripts, screenplays, or documentary narration.

skills.name: grimoire.translate-ua
skills.description: Use when asked to translate text into Ukrainian. Converts English prose to Ukrainian while preserving all technical terms, code snippets, file paths, and technical language in English.

skills.name: grimoire.translate-es
skills.description: Use when asked to translate text into Spanish. Converts English prose to Spanish while preserving all technical terms, code snippets, file paths, and technical language in English.

skills.name: grimoire.srs-to-user-stories
skills.description: Analyze a Software Requirements Specification (SRS) document and generate Scrum user stories grouped under Epics. Use when asked to extract user stories from an SRS, convert requirements into a product backlog, or decompose a specification into epics and stories.
